title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ALBAY HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GUINOBATAN, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO PIO DURAN MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3337 / 59 OG No. 35, 5722 (September 2, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3575, June 21, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ALBAY HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GUINOBATAN, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO PIO DURAN MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Albay High School in the Municipality of Guinobatan, Province of Albay, is hereby changed to Pio Duran Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1963.
